description: Stable Run Ledger v1 metric identifiers. Every entry binds to a versioned Running Signals contract_v1 gold field; serving and consumer code may not redefine it.
metricIdPolicy: <surface>.<snake_case_field>; identifiers and definitions are immutable within v1 except for backward-compatible metadata additions.

unitDefinitions.definition: ISO 8601 calendar date in the declared analytical timezone.
Kilometres per hour divided by beats per minute.
Unitless ratio; percentage displays multiply the canonical value by 100.
Total steps per minute; FIT per-leg cadence is normalized in silver before gold.
Kilometres for metric resolution rows or miles for imperial resolution rows.
